title: lygistum micans
intro: Lygistum micans, also known as Persian fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including the relief of digestive issues, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory problems. Lygistum micans is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for consumption, and in some cases, it is also used in herbal remedies for skin issues and wounds.
